tagline: Real-time collaboration, enterprise security, instant synchronization
feature_1_desc: Syncs in real-time with zero latency
product_desc_1: CloudSync Pro transforms how teams collaborate across continents. Watch your files sync instantly while maintaining enterprise-grade security.
feature_section_desc: Built for modern distributed teams who demand both speed and security. No compromises.
benefit_3: One-click integration with all your tools
tier_1_desc: Perfect for individuals and small teams
tier_3_desc: For large organizations with custom needs
faq_1_answer: Yes, all data is encrypted end-to-end using military-grade AES-256 encryption. We never have access to your unencrypted data.
faq_2_question: Can I migrate from my current provider?
faq_2_answer: Absolutely! Our migration team handles everything. Import your data safely with zero downtime, typically within 24 hours.
faq_3_answer: Sign up, configure your team, and start syncing. Most teams are productive within 30 minutes. We provide personal onboarding for Enterprise plans.
final_cta_desc: Join 50,000+ teams already using CloudSync Pro to revolutionize their workflow.
